identities.name: Floral Formula Mapping
identities.logic: Correct identification of Solanaceae vs Fabaceae symbols. Trap: Zygomorphic vs Actinomorphic symbols.

identities.name: NCERT Paragraph Diagram Anchors
identities.logic: Labeling questions for Spermatozoon, Embryo Sac, or Nucleosome wrapping. Focus on non-obvious labels.

identities.name: Genetic Cross Probability (F2)
identities.logic: Predicting ratios for Dihybrid cross exceptions (Epistasis, Incomplete Dominance).

identities.name: Microbial Commercial Products
identities.logic: Cyclosporin A vs Statins. Matching the microbe name with the specific bioactive molecule.

identities.name: Ecosystem Energy Flow 10% Rule
identities.logic: Calculating biomass or energy transfer across 4 trophic levels. Predict the top carnivore level.

identities.name: Hormones of Menstrual Cycle peaks
identities.logic: Identifying peaks of LH, FSH, Estrogen, and Progesterone. Trap: LH surge triggers ovulation.

traps.name: Assertion Reasoning Linguistic Noise
traps.description: Using 'Not' or 'Neither' in the Reason statement to confuse a correct fact with a correct explanation.

traps.name: Binomial Nomenclature Case
traps.description: Asking to identify the 'correctly printed' name (Italicization and Capitalization rules).
